reasoning: Elon Musk announced the "America Party" on July 5, 2025, which corresponds to the flurry of creator updates clarifying the criteria around that exact time. Crucially, the creator specified that a "tweet or public announcement alone is not sufficient" and that "more tangible evidence" like a website or dedicated account is required, eventually appealing to a subjective "I know it when I see it" standard by July 9. Because news from August 19 indicates Musk began "quietly putting the brakes" on the party's formation to focus on his companies and support JD Vance in 2028, it is highly likely that the project was abandoned before crossing the threshold of tangible establishment. With the project shelved by the November 2025 knowledge cutoff, it is highly improbable the market will resolve to 'Yes' by the end of the year.
